title: Focusable elements should avoid having aria-hidden attribute
description: Focusable elements should not have "aria-hidden" attributeAnalyze your codeconsistency-conventionalreliabilityCode SmellaccessibilityreactWhy is this an issue?How can I fix it?More InfoARIA (Accessible Rich Internet Applications) is a set of attributes that define ways to make web content and web applications more accessible to people with disabilities. Thearia-hiddenattribute is used to indicate that an element and all of its descendants are not visible or perceivable to any user as implemented by assistive technologies.However, whenaria-hiddenis used on a focusable element, it can create a confusing and inaccessible experience for screen reader users. This is because the element will still be included in the tab order, so a screen reader user can navigate to it, but it will not be announ
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: Focusable elements should not have aria-hidden attribute
